body.input:
You are a conservative policy review classifier for EquityStack.

Your task is to review the provided record using ONLY the evidence included in the input.

You must not speculate.
You must not use outside knowledge.
You must not guess missing facts.
If the evidence is weak, incomplete, indirect, or conflicting, you must choose classification="unclear".
If the evidence is not strong enough for safe approval, you must choose recommended_action="needs_manual_review".

Classification definitions:

- positive:
  the policy or action directly improves rights, access, protections, representation, economic opportunity, education, housing, health, voting access, or other measurable outcomes for Black Americans

- negative:
  the policy or action directly restricts rights, access, protections, representation, economic opportunity, education, housing, health, voting access, or other measurable outcomes for Black Americans, or reinforces discriminatory harm

- mixed:
  the evidence shows both meaningful positive and meaningful negative effects, or meaningful benefit with meaningful limitations

- blocked:
  the policy or action was proposed or intended but was blocked, failed, prevented, struck down, or never meaningfully implemented

- unclear:
  the evidence provided is insufficient, conflicting, too vague, or too indirect to support a reliable classification

Rules:
- Choose exactly one classification
- Use exact enum values only
- Output JSON only
- Do not include markdown
- Do not include commentary outside the JSON object
- Confidence must be a number from 0 to 1
- Confidence reflects how strongly the provided evidence supports the classification
- Prefer "unclear" over forced certainty
- Prefer "needs_manual_review" over weak approval

Return exactly this JSON shape:

{
  "entity_type": "policy|promise|link|action",
  "entity_id": "string",
  "recommended_action": "approve|reject|needs_manual_review",
  "classification": "positive|negative|mixed|blocked|unclear",
  "confidence": 0.0,
  "summary": "string",
  "reasoning_notes": ["string"],
  "missing_information": ["string"],
  "source_quality": "high|medium|low",
  "source_issues": ["string"],
  "flags": {
    "ambiguous_subject": false,
    "conflicting_sources": false,
    "weak_evidence": false,
    "date_uncertain": false
  }
}

Record to review:
{
  "entity_type": "promise",
  "entity_id": "trump-2025-election-integrity-proof-citizenship-paper-ballots",
  "record": {
    "slug": "trump-2025-election-integrity-proof-citizenship-paper-ballots",
    "title": "Require proof of citizenship and paper-ballot election safeguards",
    "promise_text": "Trump and the 2024 Republican platform supported stricter federal election-integrity rules, including documentary proof of citizenship, voter identification, paper ballots, and tighter mail-ballot rules.",
    "promise_date": "2024-07-08",
    "promise_type": "Campaign Promise",
    "campaign_or_official": "Campaign",
    "topic": "Voting Rights",
    "impacted_group": "Black voters and Black-majority communities affected by voter registration, ballot access, and election administration rules",
    "status": "Partial",
    "summary": "A March 2025 executive order advanced part of the administration's election-integrity agenda, but full implementation remained incomplete.",
    "notes": "Included because federal election-administration changes can alter access, verification burdens, and ballot-processing rules in jurisdictions with large Black voter populations. Evidence is still incomplete because implementation depends on agency action and election-system adoption beyond the order itself.",
    "promise_sources": [
      {
        "source_title": "2024 Republican Platform",
        "source_url": "https://prod-static.gop.com/media/RNC2024-Platform.pdf",
        "source_type": "Other",
        "publisher": "Republican National Committee",
        "published_date": "2024-07-08",
        "notes": "Primary promise-level source."
      }
    ],
    "actions": [
      {
        "action_type": "Executive Order",
        "action_date": "2025-03-25",
        "title": "Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections",
        "description": "The order directed federal action on documentary proof-of-citizenship requirements and related election-integrity measures.",
        "action_sources": [
          {
            "source_title": "Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections",
            "source_url": "https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/03/preserving-and-protecting-the-integrity-of-american-elections/",
            "source_type": "Government",
            "publisher": "The White House",
            "published_date": "2025-03-25",
            "notes": "Primary action-level source."
          }
        ],
        "outcomes": [
          {
            "outcome_summary": "The administration created a formal federal election-integrity directive, but nationwide implementation was not complete.",
            "outcome_type": "Administrative Outcome",
            "measurable_impact": "Federal agencies were directed to change election-related procedures, but implementation varied and remained incomplete.",
            "impact_direction": "Mixed",
            "black_community_impact_note": "Documentary-proof and ballot-processing changes can affect registration and voting access in Black communities where administrative barriers already shape turnout and ballot acceptance.",
            "evidence_strength": "Moderate",
            "status_override": "Partial",
            "outcome_sources": [
              {
                "source_title": "Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections",
                "source_url": "https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/03/preserving-and-protecting-the-integrity-of-american-elections/",
                "source_type": "Government",
                "publisher": "The White House",
                "published_date": "2025-03-25",
                "notes": "Primary outcome-level source."
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

{
  "entity_type": "promise",
  "entity_id": "trump-2025-end-federal-dei-equity-programs",
  "record": {
    "slug": "trump-2025-end-federal-dei-equity-programs",
    "title": "End federal DEI and equity-based government programs",
    "promise_text": "Trump committed the administration to ending federal DEI, DEIA, and equity-program structures across the executive branch.",
    "promise_date": "2025-01-20",
    "promise_type": "Official Promise",
    "campaign_or_official": "Official",
    "topic": "Economic Opportunity",
    "impacted_group": "Black workers, Black students, and Black communities affected by targeted federal equity initiatives and program design",
    "status": "Partial",
    "summary": "The administration ordered the termination of federal DEI and equity structures, but implementation remained an active multi-agency process.",
    "notes": "Included because the order directly targeted federal programs and offices previously used to address documented disparities affecting Black communities. Evidence is incomplete because downstream program, grant, and enforcement effects require agency-level follow-through.",
    "promise_sources": [
      {
        "source_title": "Ending Radical And Wasteful Government DEI Programs And Preferencing",
        "source_url": "https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/ending-radical-and-wasteful-government-dei-programs-and-preferencing/",
        "source_type": "Government",
        "publisher": "The White House",
        "published_date": "2025-01-20",
        "notes": "Primary promise-level source."
      }
    ],
    "actions": [
      {
        "action_type": "Executive Order",
        "action_date": "2025-01-20",
        "title": "Ending Radical And Wasteful Government DEI Programs And Preferencing",
        "description": "The order directed agencies to terminate DEI, DEIA, environmental justice, and equity-related offices, plans, grants, and policies to the maximum extent allowed by law.",
        "action_sources": [
          {
            "source_title": "Ending Radical And Wasteful Government DEI Programs And Preferencing",
            "source_url": "https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/ending-radical-and-wasteful-government-dei-programs-and-preferencing/",
            "source_type": "Government",
            "publisher": "The White House",
            "published_date": "2025-01-20",
            "notes": "Primary action-level source."
          }
        ],
        "outcomes": [
          {
            "outcome_summary": "The administration initiated the removal of federal DEI and equity structures across agencies.",
            "outcome_type": "Administrative Outcome",
            "measurable_impact": "Agencies were directed to identify and terminate covered offices, policies, grants, and related activities.",
            "impact_direction": "Negative",
            "black_community_impact_note": "Eliminating equity-focused federal offices, plans, and grant structures can reduce targeted federal attention to disparities in employment, education, contracting, and service access that affect Black communities.",
            "evidence_strength": "Moderate",
            "status_override": "Partial",
            "outcome_sources": [
              {
                "source_title": "Ending Radical And Wasteful Government DEI Programs And Preferencing",
                "source_url": "https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/2025/01/ending-radical-and-wasteful-government-dei-programs-and-preferencing/",
                "source_type": "Government",
                "publisher": "The White House",
                "published_date": "2025-01-20",
                "notes": "Primary outcome-level source."
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}

Evidence is incomplete because community-level effects depend on later implementation by DOJ and local agencies.",

      {
        "source_title": "Agenda47: President Trump Announces Plan to End Crime and Restore Law and Order",

{
  "entity_type": "promise",
  "entity_id": "trump-2025-domestic-production-of-critical-medicines",
  "record": {
    "slug": "trump-2025-domestic-production-of-critical-medicines",
    "title": "Expand domestic production of critical medicines",
    "promise_text": "Trump pledged to restore domestic production capacity for essential medicines and reduce supply-chain vulnerability and shortages.",
    "promise_date": "2023-08-29",
    "promise_type": "Campaign Promise",
    "campaign_or_official": "Campaign",
    "topic": "Healthcare",
    "impacted_group": "Black patients and Black communities affected by medicine shortages, chronic-disease treatment continuity, and pharmaceutical supply disruptions",
    "status": "Partial",
    "summary": "A 2025 executive order advanced domestic-medicine production goals, but measurable supply and access outcomes remained early.",
    "notes": "Included because pharmaceutical shortages and supply instability can affect continuity of care in conditions that disproportionately burden Black patients. Evidence is incomplete because the order primarily changed regulatory and production incentives rather than producing immediate patient-level outcomes.",
    "promise_sources": [
      {
        "source_title": "Agenda47: Returning Production of Essential Medicines Back to America and Ending Pharmaceutical Shortages",
        "source_url": "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/news/7c12c37a-67b0-4824-81f0-3b6307b72065",
        "source_type": "Other",
        "publisher": "DonaldJTrump.com",
        "published_date": "2023-08-29",
        "notes": "Primary promise-level source."
      }
    ],

        "action_type": "Executive Order",
        "action_date": "2025-05-05",

        "description": "The order directed FDA and EPA regulatory changes to speed domestic pharmaceutical manufacturing and review.",
        "action_sources": [
          {

            "source_type": "Government",

            "published_date": "2025-05-05",
            "notes": "Primary action-level source."
          }
        ],
        "outcomes": [
          {
            "outcome_summary": "The administration initiated federal regulatory changes intended to support domestic pharmaceutical manufacturing.",
            "outcome_type": "Administrative Outcome",
            "measurable_impact": "FDA and EPA were directed to streamline parts of domestic manufacturing review and permitting.",
            "impact_direction": "Positive",
            "black_community_impact_note": "More stable medicine supply chains can affect Black patients by reducing treatment disruption risks in high-burden chronic conditions, but direct community-level effects are not yet measured.",
            "evidence_strength": "Moderate",
            "status_override": "Partial",
            "outcome_sources": [
